name: Track All Transactions
description: Tracks transaction count for velocity limiting (no alert)

metadata.note: Tracker rule - increments counter without alerting

name: AI Agent Transaction Velocity Limit
description: Blocks when transaction velocity exceeds 10 transactions in 10 minutes

rule.message: 🚨 AI Agent: Unusual transaction velocity (10+ in 10 min) - possible runaway behavior or compromise

metadata.tuning_note: Adjust threshold based on agent's normal activity level

name: Track Account Creation
description: Tracks account creation count for spam detection (no alert)

metadata.note: Tracker rule - increments counter without alerting

name: AI Agent Account Creation Spam
description: Blocks when 5+ accounts are created within 5 minutes

rule.message: 🚨 AI Agent: Account creation spike (5+ in 5 min) - possible loop or compromise

metadata.tuning_note: Legitimate agents rarely create 5+ accounts in 5 minutes

name: AI Agent Repeated Block Attempts
description: Alerts when agent repeatedly attempts blocked transactions (3+ in 1 hour)

rule.message: ⚠️ AI Agent: Repeatedly attempting blocked transactions (3+ in 1h) - investigate for compromise or misconfiguration

metadata.note: blocked_transaction_count is auto-incremented by rule engine when any rule blocks
